_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MCSetups Installer
author: support@hxdev.org
description: Egg for installing MCSetups from a remote store.

installation.script:
set -o pipefail

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "[MCSetups Installer] Preparing environment..."
echo "[MCSetups Installer] Updating package list..."
apt-get update > /dev/null 2>&1
echo "[MCSetups Installer] Installing required packages (curl, unzip, jq)..."
apt-get install -y curl unzip jq > /dev/null 2>&1
echo "[MCSetups Installer] Packages installed successfully"

STORE_URL=$MCSETUPS_STORE_URL
LICENSE_KEY=$MCSETUPS_LICENSE_KEY
FILE_ID=$MCSETUPS_FILE_ID
PLACEHOLDER_VALUES=$MCSETUPS_PLACEHOLDER_VALUES
ADDON_IDS=$MCSETUPS_ADDON_IDS
WIPE_DATA=$MCSETUPS_WIPE_DATA
ZIP_AND_WIPE=$MCSETUPS_ZIP_AND_WIPE

log_message() {
    echo "[MCSetups Installer] $1"
}

log_message "========================================"
log_message "Starting MCSetups installation process"
log_message "========================================"

if [ "$ZIP_AND_WIPE" = "true" ]; then
    log_message "Step 1/6: Archiving existing server data..."
    SERVER_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")
    zip -r "${SERVER_NAME}.zip" ./* ./.??* 2>/dev/null || true
    log_message "Archive created: ${SERVER_NAME}.zip"
    log_message "Step 2/6: Deleting existing server data after archiving..."
    find . -mindepth 1 -not -name "${SERVER_NAME}.zip" -delete
    log_message "Existing data deleted"
elif [ "$WIPE_DATA" = "true" ]; then
    log_message "Step 1/6: Wiping existing server data..."
    find . -mindepth 1 -delete
    log_message "Existing data wiped"
else
    log_message "Step 1/6: Skipping data wipe (wipe_data=false)"
fi

log_message "Step 2/6: Preparing download request..."
BASE_URL=$(echo "$STORE_URL" | sed 's|/$||')
DOWNLOAD_URL="${BASE_URL}/store/download/${FILE_ID}"

log_message "Store URL: $BASE_URL"
log_message "File ID: $FILE_ID"

PAYLOAD_FILE=$(mktemp)
log_message "Constructing JSON payload..."

if ! echo "$PLACEHOLDER_VALUES" | jq empty 2>/dev/null; then
    log_message "WARNING: Invalid JSON in PLACEHOLDER_VALUES, using empty object"
    PLACEHOLDER_VALUES='{}'
fi

# Validate addon_ids JSON
if ! echo "$ADDON_IDS" | jq empty 2>/dev/null; then
    log_message "WARNING: Invalid JSON in ADDON_IDS, using empty array"
    ADDON_IDS='[]'
fi

# Log placeholder values for debugging (without sensitive data)
PLACEHOLDER_COUNT=$(echo "$PLACEHOLDER_VALUES" | jq 'length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
log_message "Placeholder values count: $PLACEHOLDER_COUNT"
if [ "$PLACEHOLDER_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
    log_message "Placeholder keys: $(echo "$PLACEHOLDER_VALUES" | jq -r 'keys | join(", ")' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')"
fi

ADDON_COUNT=$(echo "$ADDON_IDS" | jq 'length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
log_message "Addon IDs count: $ADDON_COUNT"

# Construct payload using --argjson for proper JSON parsing
jq -n -c --arg license_key "$LICENSE_KEY" --argjson placeholder_values "$PLACEHOLDER_VALUES" --argjson addon_ids "$ADDON_IDS" '{license_key: $license_key, placeholder_values: $placeholder_values, addon_ids: $addon_ids}' > "$PAYLOAD_FILE"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: Failed to construct JSON payload"
    log_message "Placeholder Values (raw): $PLACEHOLDER_VALUES"
    log_message "Addon IDs (raw): $ADDON_IDS"
    rm -f "$PAYLOAD_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

log_message "Payload constructed successfully"
log_message "Payload preview: $(cat "$PAYLOAD_FILE" | jq -c '{license_key: .license_key, placeholder_count: (.placeholder_values | length), addon_count: (.addon_ids | length)}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unable to parse')"

log_message "Step 3/6: Downloading setup from store..."
log_message "Download URL: $DOWNLOAD_URL"
log_message "This may take a few minutes depending on file size..."

HTTP_CODE_FILE=$(mktemp)
CURL_EXIT=0
curl -X POST \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -H "X-License-Key: $LICENSE_KEY" \
     -d "@$PAYLOAD_FILE" \
     "$DOWNLOAD_URL" \
     -o setup.zip \
     -w "\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" \
     --progress-bar \
     --show-error 2>&1 | tee "$HTTP_CODE_FILE" || CURL_EXIT=$?

HTTP_CODE=$(grep -o 'HTTP_CODE:[0-9][0-9][0-9]' "$HTTP_CODE_FILE" | cut -d: -f2 || echo "000")
rm -f "$HTTP_CODE_FILE"

if [ $CURL_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: curl failed with exit code $CURL_EXIT"
    if [ -f setup.zip ]; then
        rm -f setup.zip
    fi
    exit 1
fi

rm -f "$PAYLOAD_FILE"

if [ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: HTTP $HTTP_CODE received from download endpoint"
    if [ -f setup.zip ]; then
        log_message "Response content (first 500 chars):"
        head -c 500 setup.zip
echo ""
        rm -f setup.zip
    fi
    exit 1
fi

log_message "Download completed successfully (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)"

if [ ! -f setup.zip ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: setup.zip file not found after download."
    exit 1
fi

ZIP_SIZE=$(stat -c%s setup.zip 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z setup.zip 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "$ZIP_SIZE" -eq 0 ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: Downloaded file is empty."
    exit 1
fi

log_message "Downloaded file size: $(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $ZIP_SIZE 2>/dev/null || echo "${ZIP_SIZE} bytes")"

log_message "Step 4/6: Extracting setup.zip..."
log_message "Extracting files (this may take a moment)..."
unzip -o setup.zip 2>&1 | while read line; do
    echo "[MCSetups Installer] $line"
done
UNZIP_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

if [ $UNZIP_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    log_message "ERROR: Failed to extract setup.zip (exit code: $UNZIP_EXIT)."
    exit 1
fi

log_message "Extraction completed successfully"

log_message "Step 5/6: Checking extracted files..."
EXTRACTED_COUNT=$(find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name setup.zip | wc -l)
log_message "Found $EXTRACTED_COUNT items in root directory"

TOP_LEVEL_DIRS=$(find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d ! -name "\.*")
if [ -n "$TOP_LEVEL_DIRS" ]; then
    DIR_COUNT=$(echo "$TOP_LEVEL_DIRS" | wc -l)
    if [ "$DIR_COUNT" -eq 1 ]; then
        TOP_DIR=$(echo "$TOP_LEVEL_DIRS" | head -1 | sed 's|^./||')
        log_message "Moving files from $TOP_DIR/ to root..."
        mv "$TOP_DIR"/* . 2>/dev/null || true
        mv "$TOP_DIR"/.* . 2>/dev/null || true
        rmdir "$TOP_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true
        log_message "Files moved successfully"
    else
        log_message "Multiple top-level directories found, keeping structure as-is"
    fi
fi


log_message "Step 5.5/6: Installing addons..."
ADDON_DETAILS=$MCSETUPS_ADDON_DETAILS

if [ -n "$ADDON_DETAILS" ] && [ "$ADDON_DETAILS" != "[]" ] && [ "$ADDON_DETAILS" != "null" ]; then
    ADDON_COUNT=$(echo "$ADDON_DETAILS" | jq 'length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    log_message "Installing $ADDON_COUNT addon(s)..."
    
    if [ "$ADDON_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
        for i in $(seq 0 $((ADDON_COUNT - 1))); do
            ADDON_ID=$(echo "$ADDON_DETAILS" | jq -r ".[$i].id" 2>/dev/null)
            FILE_LOCATION=$(echo "$ADDON_DETAILS" | jq -r ".[$i].file_location // \"/\"" 2>/dev/null)
            
            if [ -z "$ADDON_ID" ] || [ "$ADDON_ID" = "null" ]; then
                continue
            fi
            
            FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN=$(echo "$FILE_LOCATION" | sed 's|^/||' | sed 's|/$||')
            
            if [ -z "$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN" ] || [ "$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN" = "/" ]; then
                TARGET_DIR="."
            elif [ "$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN" = "plugins" ]; then
                TARGET_DIR="./plugins"
            elif [ "$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN" = "config" ]; then
                TARGET_DIR="./config"
            elif [ "$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN" = "mods" ]; then
                TARGET_DIR="./mods"
            else
                TARGET_DIR="./$FILE_LOCATION_CLEAN"
            fi
            
            log_message "Downloading addon ID $ADDON_ID to $TARGET_DIR..."
            
            mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"
            
            ADDON_DOWNLOAD_URL="${BASE_URL}/store/addons/${ADDON_ID}/download"
            ADDON_TEMP_FILE=$(mktemp)
            
            HTTP_CODE_FILE=$(mktemp)
            CURL_EXIT=0
            curl -X GET \
                 -H "X-License-Key: $LICENSE_KEY" \
                 "$ADDON_DOWNLOAD_URL" \
                 -o "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE" \
                 -w "\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" \
                 --progress-bar \
                 --show-error 2>&1 | tee "$HTTP_CODE_FILE" || CURL_EXIT=$?
            
            HTTP_CODE=$(grep -o 'HTTP_CODE:[0-9][0-9][0-9]' "$HTTP_CODE_FILE" | cut -d: -f2 || echo "000")
            rm -f "$HTTP_CODE_FILE"
            
            if [ $CURL_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ]; then
                log_message "WARNING: Failed to download addon $ADDON_ID (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)"
                rm -f "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE"
                continue
            fi
            
            if unzip -t "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
                log_message "Extracting addon $ADDON_ID to $TARGET_DIR..."
                unzip -o "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE" -d "$TARGET_DIR" > /dev/null 2>&1
                UNZIP_EXIT=$?
                if [ $UNZIP_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
                    log_message "WARNING: Failed to extract addon $ADDON_ID"
                else
                    log_message "Addon $ADDON_ID installed successfully to $TARGET_DIR"
                fi
            else
                ADDON_FILENAME=$(basename "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE")
                mv "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE" "$TARGET_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
                log_message "Addon $ADDON_ID installed successfully to $TARGET_DIR"
            fi
            
            rm -f "$ADDON_TEMP_FILE"
        done
        log_message "Addon installation completed"
    fi
else
    log_message "No addons to install"
fi
log_message "Step 6/6: Cleaning up temporary files..."
rm -f setup.zip
log_message "Cleanup completed"

log_message "========================================"
log_message "MCSetups installation completed successfully!"
log_message "========================================"

variables.name: File ID
variables.description: ID of the setup file to install (numeric e.g. 1, or client product e.g. client-1)

variables.name: Addon IDs
variables.description: JSON string of addon IDs to include

variables.name: Wipe Data
variables.description: Whether to wipe existing server data

variables.name: Zip and Wipe
variables.description: Whether to zip and wipe existing server data

variables.name: Addon Details
variables.description: JSON string of addon details with file locations
